# PanelRightClose

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::PanelRightClose;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        PanelRightClose { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```

## Tags
sidebar, secondary, drawer, hide, chevron, >

layout, arrows
